comment: Tidebreaker rules metadata (plan §5e: the SVG carries shape, this file carries scoring/mode rules). Consumed by src/game/Scoring.ts and src/game/tidebreaker.ts. Design truth: design/tables/tidebreaker/BRIEF.md.

currentCombo.comment: The Current (full orbit): repeat loops inside the window escalate ×2 per step.

winch.comment: Completing the full winch ramp + habitrail trip (rail-out sensor).

trench.comment: Trench-mouth subway transit under the field to the dive bell.

diveBell.comment: Kickout scoop: each capture awards the next salvage haul in order (wrapping); the last haul also feeds LEVIATHAN. Every capture lights the trench gutter.

depthGauge.comment: Completing D-I-V-E advances one stage; the bonus multiplier tracks the stage (capped) and each completion lights the escape-hatch kickback.

leviathan.comment: Wizard mode: reach TRENCH FLOOR and cycle the airlock banksRequired times, then the next Current starts it.

skill.comment: SOUNDING (differentiation pass): a soft plunge peaking in the sensor-skill-sounding band (fires at <= maxSpeed m/s) pays points and spots one D-I-V-E lane. Once per ball.
